src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments used by Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/JWTAu.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/MyAcc.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/MyAcc.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Spring Boot 3.x (which runs on Jakarta EE 9+); using them causes ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.why_exists: Compile error: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.general_idea: Update WebSecurityCustomizer to use requestMatchers instead of deprecated antMatchers.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.why_exists: Compile error: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; requestMatchers is the required replacement.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.general_idea: Refactor HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSLs required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.why_exists: Compile error: The old fluent API (e.g., .authorizeRequests().antMatchers()) is removed; lambda DSLs (e.g., .authorizeHttpRequests(authz -> ...)) are mandatory.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.general_idea: Replace deprecated applyPermitDefaultValues with explicit CORS configuration methods.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.why_exists: Compile error: applyPermitDefaultValues is removed in Spring Security 6; explicit setters like addAllowedOriginPattern are required.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.general_idea: Add setPasswordEncoder to DaoAuthenticationProvider to fix runtime security configuration.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/config/Secur.why_exists: Runtime error: DaoAuthenticationProvider requires a password encoder; failing to set it causes authentication failures or exceptions in newer Spring Security versions.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/controllers/.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/controllers/.why_exists: javax.validation package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; compilation fails with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/controllers/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespace migration.
src/main/java/top/rslly/iot/controllers/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using them causes ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors on Spring Boot 3.
